Skin in the game

The numbers that matter.

We apply the method to our own ventures first. Before offering it to you, we prove it on ourselves.

0
In-house ventures built
0

0
Industries served
0
In-house team · no outsourcing
Creative Engineering

The 6-step method.

From first conversation to system in production. Deep investigation, MVP in days, phased build and ongoing sustainment.

01

Connect & Diagnose

We understand your context, ERP, flows and bottlenecks.

  • Free 1h diagnosis
  • Context investigation
  • Stakeholder mapping
  • Strategic briefing
02

Strategic Direction

Roadmap, macro vision and priority matrix.

  • Custom roadmap
  • Positioning + value prop
  • Priority matrix
  • Vision document
03

MVP in Days

Functional prototype before the contract, live validation.

  • Prototype in 3 to 7 days
  • Live demonstration
  • Expanded vision
  • Skin in the game
04

Phased Build

Short sprints, incremental delivery, validation by step.

  • Short sprints with clear goals
  • Continuous delivery
  • Shared Notion panel
  • Biweekly meetings
05

Integration & Go-Live

Connection to your current ERP, training, phased go-live.

  • API integration
  • Team training
  • Phased go-live
  • LGPD/GDPR compliance
06

Ongoing Sustainment

10 monthly tech hours, WhatsApp support, 90-day warranty.

  • 10 tech hours/month
  • WhatsApp support in 4h
  • 90-day warranty
  • Evolution roadmap
← drag or scroll sideways →
What we build

Technical capabilities across six fronts.

Clients don't buy capabilities — they buy pain resolution. But the technical kit has to be ready.

</>

Custom systems

Web platforms, PWAs, internal ERPs, document systems and multi-unit setups designed for your operation.

⌬

AI marketplaces

Buy and sell with intelligent agents negotiating via WhatsApp, lead automation and integrated management.

∞

Smart automations

Automated flows with n8n, API integrations, agents that replace repetitive manual work.

◈

Applied AI

Negotiator agents, OCR, automatic classification, predictive analytics. AI with purpose and outcome.

$

Fintech & payments

Whitelabel accounts, sub-acquiring, integrated payments, digital banking. We've built 4 to date.

⚡

High-conversion sites

Institutional sites and landing pages that convert — not decorative, metric-driven.

Naveo Portfolio

12 in-house ventures. Real skin in the game.

Before offering it to you, we built ours. Each in-house business is a living lab for the method.

Client cases

You bring the pain. We build the solution.

Companies that came with a specific demand and left with a complete digital operation.

Operational platform · Document management

Facilita Higienização

Industrial cleaning network with multiple units. They were pushing paper, certificates expiring unnoticed, labor risk latent. We built a multi-unit DMS with legal e-signature, PWA for managers and deadline dashboard.

“You brought something I didn't imagine was possible.”
PWA iPhone, Android, iPad
LGPD Full compliance
90d From signing to go-live
Vertical ERP · Construction

ObraSimples

Client came asking for a fintech solution. We identified a bigger opportunity: a custom ERP/Micro SaaS for small construction entrepreneurs. Invoices, PIX, financial management, inventory control, quotes and tax invoices.

“They showed us a new opportunity for a new business.”
Custom Client owns the code
Fintech PIX + invoices integrated
MRR Ongoing sustainment
Healthcare platform · from zero

Cuidar Bem Card

Healthcare company built from scratch, from business model to complete platform. Concept, development, branding, go-to-market — Creative Engineering end-to-end.

“It turned into a complete business that is changing how people access healthcare services.”
300% 12-month growth
3 Brazilian states
0→1 Concept to operation
Trusted by

From regional networks to cooperative systems. Different industries, same method.

Where we are

From the heart of Brazil
to anywhere.

HQLucas do Rio Verde
StateMato Grosso
CountryBrazil

We operate from the center of Brazilian agribusiness — where operations are massive, time is short, and the system has to run.

Let's build together?

1-hour diagnosis, free and no strings attached. We understand your operation, map bottlenecks and return a structured diagnosis within 5 business days.
